dj_text: That was Funky Town (Medieval Style). Now HERE'S Uptown Funk (Medieval Style)!
commercial_text: Listeners, we've been blasting medieval-style funk all week and now for a truly outlandish update!
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} "Hey hey, this is The Interdimensional Groove
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Uptown Funk (Medieval Style)
